LanguageData.archotechoath.label: <color=#D4AF37>archotech oath</color>
LanguageData.archotechoath.description: A fragmentary archotech protocol has taken root in the host's nervous system. It does not grant divinity, but it compels relentless refinement of thought, craft, leadership, and endurance.
LanguageData.archotechoath_cognition.label: oracle cognition
LanguageData.archotechoath_cognition.description: Pattern prediction and disciplined thought elevate learning and research.
LanguageData.archotechoath_industry.label: forgebound discipline
LanguageData.archotechoath_industry.description: Fine motor control and tireless routine turn labor into precision craft.
LanguageData.archotechoath_command.label: governor cadence
LanguageData.archotechoath_command.description: Measured speech and composure steady allies and bend negotiations.
LanguageData.archotechoath_aegis.label: self-repair aegis
LanguageData.archotechoath_aegis.description: Micromechanites prioritize structural integrity and rapid recovery under stress.
LanguageData.frontierwarden.label: <color=#6B8E23>frontier warden</color>
LanguageData.frontierwarden.description: Raised by hard land and harder duty, this doctrine shapes a pawn into the colony's shield. They scout farther, shoot cleaner, mend faster, and stand firm where lines would otherwise break.
LanguageData.frontierwarden_pathfinder.label: pathfinder stride
LanguageData.frontierwarden_pathfinder.description: Hard-march conditioning improves movement, hauling, and field awareness.
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fireline.label: fireline doctrine
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fireline.description: Battlefield drills improve aim discipline and target acquisition under pressure.
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fieldsurgeon.label: field surgeon's calm
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fieldsurgeon.description: Triaged instincts and steady hands sustain allies through prolonged campaigns.
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breachfighter.label: breachfighter resolve
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breachfighter.description: Close-quarters aggression and stubborn defense hold the line in chaos.
